release.notes:
No Artisan or KENDUN markings in runouts

Includes a printed inner sleeve with credits on one side and a band photo on the other.

videos.title: REO Speedwagon - Hi Infidelity (Full Album)
videos.description:

videos.title: REO Speedwagon - Hi Infidelity. Side 1. HQ Vinyl Rip. (Linn Sondek LP12)
videos.description:
This is Side 1 of the first UK pressing of "Hi Infidelity" by REO Speedwagon. Will do Side 2 soon 

This was a request from Linda Wrazen in the USA. Hope you enjoy!

videos.title: REO Speedwagon - Hi Infidelity. Side 2. HQ Vinyl Rip. (Linn Sondek LP12)
videos.description:
This is Side 2 of the first UK pressing of "Hi Infidelity" by REO Speedwagon.  

This was a request from Linda Wrazen in the USA. Hope you enjoy!
